title: Minimum Window Subsequence
hints: Focus on the last character of t. Once you find it in s, how can you efficiently trace back to find the earliest start of the window?
Use dynamic programming where dp[i][j] stores the starting index of the shortest window in s ending at i that contains t[0..j] as a subsequence.
To compute dp[i][j], look for the previous occurrence of t[j] in s before index i, then extend the solution for t[0..j-1] ending at that position.
